Name: Other Post Effects
Description: Miscellaneous post-processing parameters covering ambient occlusion filtering, blur passes, motion blur behavior, temporal feedback effects, and anti-aliasing configuration.

Fields.Name: Depth Clip Range
Fields.Description: Defines the maximum depth range considered when evaluating depth-based post effects.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 0
Fields.Description: Defines the near-range depth interval used for evaluating screen-space effects.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 1
Fields.Description: Defines the mid-range depth interval used for evaluating screen-space effects.

Fields.Name: Depth Evaluation Range: 2
Fields.Description: Defines the far-range depth interval used for evaluating screen-space effects.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the overall strength of ambient occlusion contribution.

Fields.Name: Sample Offset
Fields.Description: Controls the offset distance used when sampling neighboring pixels for occlusion or filtering.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Offset
Fields.Description: Applies a bias to ambient occlusion results to reduce excessive darkening.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 0
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the first occlusion layer, typically affecting fine details.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 1
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the second occlusion layer, affecting medium-scale shading.

Fields.Name: Ambient Occlusion Blend Scale: 2
Fields.Description: Controls blending strength of the third occlusion layer, affecting large-scale occlusion.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 0
Fields.Description: Sets blur radius for the first pass, targeting fine-grain noise reduction.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 1
Fields.Description: Sets blur radius for the second pass, smoothing medium-frequency noise.

Fields.Name: Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Sets blur radius for the third pass, smoothing large-scale artifacts.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius
Fields.Description: Controls the radius of the final blur pass applied before compositing.

Fields.Name: Final Blur Radius: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary parameter for final blur shaping, often used for directional or anisotropic smoothing.

Fields.Name: Final Blur 4x2
Fields.Description: Enables a 4x2 sampling pattern for the final blur pass to optimize performance or directional filtering.

Fields.Name: Enable Anti-Aliasing
Fields.Description: Enables post-process anti-aliasing to reduce jagged edges and improve image smoothness.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Blur
Fields.Description: Enables motion blur based on camera and object movement.

Fields.Name: Blur Time Ratio
Fields.Description: Controls how motion blur accumulates over time, affecting streak length and intensity.

Fields.Name: Number of Base Samples
Fields.Description: Defines the base number of samples used for motion blur or temporal filtering.

Fields.Name: Max Blur Length
Fields.Description: Limits the maximum length of motion blur streaks to prevent excessive smearing.

Fields.Name: Max Recurrences
Fields.Description: Controls how many recursive blur steps are applied in motion blur accumulation.

Fields.Name: Sample Interleaved
Fields.Description: Controls interleaved sampling patterns to reduce banding and improve performance.

Fields.Name: Camera Rotation Perspective Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold at which camera rotation contributes to motion blur intensity.

Fields.Name: Camera Translation Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold at which camera movement contributes to motion blur intensity.

Fields.Name: Falloff Distance Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum distance at which motion blur or post effects begin to fade based on depth.

Fields.Name: Falloff Distance Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum distance beyond which motion blur or post effects are fully faded out.

Fields.Name: Enable Feedback Blur
Fields.Description: Enables temporal feedback blur using previous frame data for smoothing or stylized effects.

Fields.Name: Feedback Weight
Fields.Description: Controls the blending weight of previous frame data in feedback effects.

Fields.Name: Feedback Interval
Fields.Description: Defines the time interval used for feedback accumulation, affecting temporal smoothing speed.

Fields.Name: Feedback Aspect Ratio
Fields.Description: Controls aspect ratio scaling for feedback effects, influencing directional blur/stretch behavior.
